event: Street view of Rue Saint Lazare in Paris
description: An elevated view looking down a busy Parisian street lined with tall Haussmann-style buildings. The street recedes into the distance, filled with horse-drawn carriages, omnibuses, and pedestrians. The buildings are rendered in warm creams and pale yellows with grey rooftops. A prominent corner building with a rounded facade dominates the middle ground. The sky is pale and luminous with warm golden tones. The brushwork is loose and impressionistic, capturing the bustling energy of urban life. A signature appears at the lower right.
